title: Wisconsin and HawaiГЉВ»i Governors Join Affordable Clean Cars Coalition
content: The U.S. Climate Alliance announced that the governors of Wisconsin and HawaiГЉВ»i have joined the Affordable Clean Cars Coalition Гўв‚¬вЂќ a growing partnership among governors to help sustain AmericaГўв‚¬в„ўs transition to cleaner and more affordable cars, support U.S. automotive manufacturers and workers, and safeguard statesГўв‚¬в„ў clean air authority.Гўв‚¬Е“All Wisconsinites deserve to be able to drive the newest and cleanest cars on the market, especially those that save money and pollute less,Гўв‚¬Вќ said Wisconsin Governor Evers. Гўв‚¬Е“We need to make it easier, not harder, for consumers to upgrade to electric vehicles Гўв‚¬вЂќ and thatГўв‚¬в„ўs exactly what weГўв‚¬в„ўre doing through this state-led partnership.Гўв‚¬Вќ
